texto: She tried to remember all the times she had spoken to him. She replayed every moment she could remember at the beach last week. Not once had she led him to believe that she liked him improperly. And yet, last night, he had appeared as if she had invited him. She had given herself so willingly, so lasciviously, that he must have thought she had desired him all along. Perhaps she had, or perhaps she had not realised how pleasurable intimacy could be.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mahita Vas: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “She tried to remember all the times she had spoken to him. She replayed every moment she could re…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, anchoring, attachment pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
